steps.title: Read the context
steps.content: The uncle says the hardest <u>part</u> of telling a story is finding the beginning. He's identifying one component of the storytelling task, not a region or musical line.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The underlined word needs to mean a component or aspect of a task — the uncle identifies finding the beginning as one piece of the storytelling challenge. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Zone: the hardest "zone" of telling a story — zone means a region or area in space, which doesn't apply to an abstract task like storytelling. ✗
  • Choice B — Melody: the hardest "melody" of telling a story — melody means a musical line or tune, unrelated to the act of telling a story. ✗
  • Choice C — Element: the hardest "element" of telling a story — element means a component or aspect of something, which fits: finding the beginning is one component of the storytelling task. ✓
  • Choice D — Blob: the hardest "blob" of telling a story — blob means a shapeless mass, which has no coherent meaning in this context. ✗
That matches Choice C — Element.
